# zenbench public API — additions from non-default features
# features: alloc-profiling,async,charts,cli,cpu-time,criterion-compat,daemon,precise-timing,wasm
# (regenerated on every `cargo test` by zenutils-apidoc; ZEN_API_DOC=check verifies, =off skips).
# Encodings: crate-name prefix stripped; auto traits collapse to a
# count + exceptions; trait impls collapse to one roster line per
# type (method signatures live at the trait definition); blanket
# impls omitted; re-export duplicates annotated `[also: path]`.
# DO NOT EDIT BY HAND — commit regenerated changes with the code.

## summary
#
#   pub modules                                 3
#   pub types (struct/enum/trait/alias)        10
#   pub macros                                  2
#   free functions                              3
#   inherent methods                           48
#   struct fields                               5
#   enum variants                               9
#   re-exports                                  1
#   trait roster entries (type × trait)        16
#   auto-trait-complete types                   4
#   auto-trait exceptions                       5
#
# per-module pub lines:
#   (root)                           13

## items (81 lines)

pub mod wasm
pub use wasm::wasmtime
pub struct wasm::WasmBench

## trait impls (7 types)

## auto traits

4 types implement all of: Freeze, RefUnwindSafe, Send, Sync, Unpin, UnwindSafe
